title: Can I Retire at 35 with $500k? A Complete Strategy Breakdown
subtitle: Every strategy simulated — from the safest withdrawal plans to real estate, dividend income, and geo-arbitrage. No hand-waving. Just math.
description: Can you retire at 35 with $500,000? We run every scenario — from the safest S&P 500 withdrawal strategies to real estate, dividend ETFs like JEPI, geo-arbitrage, house hacking, and hybrid approaches.
